core_design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: The app is an interactive novel; tasks are quests. Blend productivity utility with high-end gaming UX.
Emotion First: Every screen must feel emotionally directed based on the active story theme.
Contrast & Depth: Use deep black backgrounds (#0A0A0A) heavily overlayed with colored linear-gradients to create atmospheric depth.
Tactile Feedback: Every task completion (quest victory) must trigger expo-haptics and a satisfying micro-animation.

noir.name: Detective Noir
noir.atmosphere: High contrast black and white, heavy rain shadows.

zombie.name: Zombie Horror
zombie.atmosphere: Toxic green mist, decay, grunge suspense.

pirate.name: Pirate
pirate.atmosphere: Ocean midnight, cyan moon, dark wood.

headings.strategy: Expressive & Large. DO NOT use generic sans for story titles.

body.strategy: System-safe geometric or clean sans (Inter/System) for legibility, allowing the theme headers to stand out.

ActiveStoryHeroView.structure: Full-width expo-image taking top 40% of the screen. Absolute positioned LinearGradient overlay (transparent -> #0A0A0A) to seamlessly blend into content.
ActiveStoryHeroView.content: Story title in theme font, current beat status over an expo-blur glassmorphism badge.

VillainEncounterCard.structure: Large portrait (AI generated), surrounded by a 2px border matching the theme's primary color. Deep shadow (elevation: 10).
VillainEncounterCard.animation: Reanimated FadeInUp with spring configuration on mount.

QuestCard.structure: Rectangular card, bg: surface. Left border width 4px mapped to theme primary color. Right side has a custom radio button.
QuestCard.interaction: On press: trigger Haptics.impactAsync('heavy'). Text gets a line-through, opacity drops to 0.5. Reanimated scale down slightly.

VictoryCelebration.structure: Triggers upon villain defeat. react-native-confetti-cannon shoots from bottom center. Large typography displaying 'VICTORY'.
VictoryCelebration.animation: Reanimated scale up of the gained badge/points.

StoryProgressVisualization.structure: Instead of a basic progress bar, render a vertical timeline (like a quest log). Completed beats are bright and connected by a glowing line (LinearGradient); upcoming beats are dimmed (opacity 0.3).

animations.navigation: Fade transitions between screens to mimic pages turning or scenes changing.
animations.beat_reveal: When a new story beat is unlocked, use a strong spring animation to scale it from 0.8 to 1.0.

instructions_to_main_agent: Redesign the 5 existing screens (Home, Tasks, Stories, Profile, Create-Story) using this cinematic language.
Do NOT break the FastAPI backend integration. The data models (daily/weekly/monthly tasks) remain the same; ONLY the visual presentation changes from 'basic lists' to 'Quest Logs'.
Use expo-image for all background images fetched from the URLs provided in this JSON.
Use expo-linear-gradient extensively over images to ensure white text remains accessible (APCA/WCAG compliant).
Implement glassmorphism using expo-blur (<BlurView intensity={20} tint='dark'>) for story beat cards sitting on top of the hero images.
Apply data-testid to all interactive elements for robust testing (e.g., data-testid='start-quest-btn').
The files to modify are standard React Native .js/.jsx files. Do NOT use tailwindcss classes; implement these guidelines via StyleSheet.create().
